children.heading: .—Assistance Relating to Certain Non-defense Contracts
children.label: a .—Assistance Relating to Certain Non-defense Contracts
children.text: The procurement technical assistance furnished by eligible entities assisted by the Department of Defense under this chapter may include technical assistance relating to contracts entered into with (1) Federal departments and agencies other than the Department of Defense, and (2) State and local governments.

children.heading: .—Information Relating to Assistance and Other Programs Available
children.label: b .—Information Relating to Assistance and Other Programs Available
children.text: An eligible entity assisted by the Department of Defense under this chapter also may furnish information relating to assistance and other programs available pursuant to the Defense Conversion, Reinvestment, and Transition Assistance Act of 1992.

children.heading: .—Education on Requirements Applicable to Small Businesses Under Certain Regulations
